title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 530.080 - Motion for new trial — appeal
text:
530.080.  Motion for new trial — appeal. — Any final judgment in prohibition shall be reviewable by a motion for a new trial, and by appeal, as in other civil actions; but in the case of an appeal from the judgment of any circuit court imposing a prohibition, the appeal shall not operate to discontinue or in any wise affect the force of the judgment as a stay of the proceedings in question, until such appeal be determined.
(RSMo 1939 § 1780, A. 1949 H.B. 2131, A.L. 1978 H.B. 1634) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1616; 1919 § 2064; 1909 § 2629 
Effective 1-02-79
